description: Curated dotfile bundles for Hyprland (Wayland) desktops. Each setup is a self-contained folder of drop-in config files targeting a specific aesthetic or workflow.
target_os: Arch Linux (or any distro with Hyprland, Waybar, Rofi, Dunst, Alacritty, Zsh)
disclaimer: Config files are provided as starting points. Adjust monitor names, keybinds, and font paths to match your hardware.
deploy_hint: Copy files to the paths listed in each setup's setup.json, then reload Hyprland with: hyprctl reload

setups.name: macOS-like
setups.tagline: Clean, light, Catppuccin Latte — macOS aesthetics on Linux

setups.name: Windows 11-like
setups.tagline: Bottom taskbar, centered icons, acrylic dark glass — Windows feel on Wayland

setups.name: Programming
setups.tagline: Tokyo Night, maximum screen space, Starship prompt, dev-first keybinds

setups.name: Pride
setups.tagline: Trans-flag base, rainbow animated borders, vibrant and expressive

setups.name: Minimal
setups.tagline: Ultra-minimal monochrome desktop. No blur, no shadows, no distractions.
setups.style: monochrome, flat, no effects, no animations

setups.name: Gaming
setups.tagline: Gruvbox Dark, master layout, gamemode + MangoHud ready, performance-first

setups.name: Catppuccin Mocha
setups.tagline: Dark, cozy Catppuccin Mocha — gradient borders, blur, Starship prompt
